title: Infantry FC ready to take on Beaufort after draw
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - In a gripping clash at the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - In a gripping clash at the Infantry School Sportsground on Saturday 26 April, the senior team of Infantry School FC delivered a standout performance against Hanover Park FC who are the current log leaders of the ABC Motsepe League with 46 points.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - In a gripping clash at the Infantry School Sportsground on Saturday 26 April, the senior team of Infantry School FC delivered a standout performance against Hanover Park FC who are the current log leaders of the ABC Motsepe League with 46 points."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The match kicked off at 14:00 and kept spectators on the edge of their seats from start to finish.","html":"The match kicked off at 14:00 and kept spectators on the edge of their seats from start to finish."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Despite Hanover Park's top-tier status, they were unable to find the back of the net."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Infantry School FC, showing great determination and skill, came close to scoring on multiple occasions they couldn't quite convert those chances and the team walked away with a hard-fought 0 - 0 draw that felt like a win in its own right.","html":"Infantry School FC, showing great determination and skill, came close to scoring on multiple occasions they couldn't quite convert those chances and the team walked away with a hard-fought 0 - 0 draw that felt like a win in its own right."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The squad's cohesion and tactical discipline were clear indicators of the positive impact made by newly appointed head coach, Ricardo Williams.","html":"The squad's cohesion and tactical discipline were clear indicators of the positive impact made by newly appointed head coach, Ricardo Williams."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Infantry School FC will next face Beaufort West FC on 3 May at Rustdene Stadium.","html":"Infantry School FC will next face Beaufort West FC on 3 May at Rustdene Stadium."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Infantry FC ready to take on Beaufort after draw
